description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a well-maintained garden and landscaping. The exterior walls are predominantly white, complemented by large windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The property features a driveway at the front, a lush backyard with a circular pool, and several green spaces including hedges, flower beds, and a palm tree. The house has a minimalist design with clean lines, and the main entrance is accessible via a short pathway flanked by greenery. The backyard is enclosed by a white fence, providing privacy and a clear boundary for the property. The overall layout emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and a seamless connection between the indoor and outdoor areas.
description: A modern, single-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped gardens, featuring a backyard pool and enclosed by a white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, and a glimpse of the landscaped front yard with hedges and a palm tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long rectangular layout, extensive backyard lawn, circular pool, and garden beds.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a pool, flower beds, and the back facade of the house with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side garden, additional hedges, and the rear entry to the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a flat door, short pathway, and minimal landscaping, no porch or columns
